mapper.select: select b.id, b.product_id as productId, p.name as productName, p.category_id as categoryId, b.batch_code as batchCode, b.production_time as productionTime, b.expiration_time as expirationTime, b.stock_quantity as stockQuantity, b.locked_quantity as lockedQuantity, b.sold_quantity as soldQuantity, greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) as availableQuantity, greatest(datediff(b.expiration_time, now()), 0) as daysToExpire, case when b.status = 3 then greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) else 0 end as wasteQuantity, p.price as basePrice, round( p.price * coalesce(( select pr.discount_rate from pricing_rule pr where pr.status = 1 and greatest(datediff(b.expiration_time, now()), 0) between pr.min_days_to_expire and pr.max_days_to_expire order by pr.priority desc, pr.max_days_to_expire asc limit 1 ), 1.00), 2 ) as currentPrice, b.status from inventory_batch b left join product p on p.id = b.product_id where b.id = #{id}

select b.id, b.product_id as productId, p.name as productName, p.category_id as categoryId, b.batch_code as batchCode, b.production_time as productionTime, b.expiration_time as expirationTime, b.stock_quantity as stockQuantity, b.locked_quantity as lockedQuantity, b.sold_quantity as soldQuantity, greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) as availableQuantity, greatest(datediff('DAY', now(), b.expiration_time), 0) as daysToExpire, case when b.status = 3 then greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) else 0 end as wasteQuantity, p.price as basePrice, round( p.price * coalesce(( select pr.discount_rate from pricing_rule pr where pr.status = 1 and greatest(datediff('DAY', now(), b.expiration_time), 0) between pr.min_days_to_expire and pr.max_days_to_expire order by pr.priority desc, pr.max_days_to_expire asc limit 1 ), 1.00), 2 ) as currentPrice, b.status from inventory_batch b left join product p on p.id = b.product_id where b.id = #{id}

select id, product_id as productId, batch_code as batchCode, production_time as productionTime, expiration_time as expirationTime, stock_quantity as stockQuantity, locked_quantity as lockedQuantity, sold_quantity as soldQuantity, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, create_user as createUser, update_user as updateUser from inventory_batch where id = #{id}
select id from inventory_batch where batch_code = #{batchCode} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into inventory_batch( product_id, batch_code, production_time, expiration_time, stock_quantity, locked_quantity, sold_quantity, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user ) values ( #{productId}, #{batchCode}, #{productionTime}, #{expirationTime}, #{stockQuantity}, #{lockedQuantity}, #{soldQuantity}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser} )
mapper.update: update inventory_batch set product_id = #{productId}, batch_code = #{batchCode}, production_time = #{productionTime}, expiration_time = #{expirationTime}, stock_quantity = #{stockQuantity}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime}, update_user = #{updateUser} where id = #{id}
update inventory_batch set status = 1, update_time = now() where status = 2 and stock_quantity - locked_quantity - sold_quantity > 0 and expiration_time > now()
update inventory_batch set status = 3, update_time = now() where status = 1 and expiration_time <= now()
update inventory_batch set status = 2, update_time = now() where status = 1 and stock_quantity - locked_quantity - sold_quantity <= 0 and expiration_time > now()
